[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories with no enwiki]] [[ja:Category:農林水産業]] [[als:Category:Land- u Forschtwirtschaft, Fischerei]] [[bg:Category:Селско, горско и рибно стопанство]] [[de:Category:Land- und Forstwirtschaft, Fischerei]] [[mn:Category:Хөдөө-, ой-, загасчлалын аж ахуй]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:Lông-lîm-chúi sán-gia̍p]]

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"

Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure

Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Agriculture%2C_Forestry_and_Fisheries here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Agriculture%2C_Forestry_and_Fisheries for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<!--templates-->
